channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - wccftech.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for wccftech.com

item.title: South of Midnight Arrives on PS5 and Nintendo Switch 2 Later This Month
item.content:encoded:
After confirming that South of Midnight would be coming to PS5 and Nintendo Switch 2 sometime in Spring 2026 a few hours ahead of The Game Awards 2025, developer Compulsion Games has confirmed that its previously Xbox Series console exclusive will arrive on PS5 and Nintendo Switch 2 later this month on March 31, 2026.

The release date for the new versions of the game came with a new trailer, which you can see below. After Avowed, Compulsion Games' South of Midnight was the next major release from an Xbox Game Studios team to hit shelves last year.

Now, it'll be the first previously Xbox Series console exclusive to make its way to other platforms in 2026, with Halo Campaign Evolved coming to PS5 later this year.

I reviewed South of Midnight for Wccftech last year, and while its combat is forgettable and mostly gets in your way, everything around it, the storytelling, performances, animation, art, and most importantly, the music, make it an excellent experience that is absolutely worth checking out.

"South of Midnight has some incredibly strong storytelling chops, brought together by its stunning visual design and excellent soundtrack. Unfortunately, the experience is bogged down by boring, repetitive combat and lackluster platforming, but it's worth rushing through those parts to experience everything else South of Midnight has to offer."

Follow Wccftech on Google to get more of our news coverage in your feeds.



https://wccftech.com/south-of-midnight-ps5-nintendo-switch-2-release-date/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
